summary:
Urticales is an order of flowering plants. Before molecular phylogenetics became an important part of plant taxonomy, Urticales was recognized in many, perhaps even most, systems of plant classification, with some variations in circumscription. Among these is the Cronquist system (1981), which placed the order in the subclass Hamamelidae [sic], as comprising:Barbeyaceae
Cannabaceae
Cecropiaceae
Moraceae
Ulmaceae
Urticaceae
